title: Raccoon Removal in Englewood, NJ | $900 – $4,000 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal services in Englewood, NJ. Licensed experts serving residential and commercial properties. Same-day service available. Call now for a free estimate!
intro: Englewood, New Jersey residents facing raccoon infestations need fast, humane, and effective solutions to protect their homes and businesses. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive raccoon removal services throughout Englewood, from historic neighborhoods near Grand Avenue to modern residences along the Palisades. Our experienced technicians use proven methods to safely remove raccoons and prevent future intrusions.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served the Englewood community for years with licensed, insured professionals who understand the unique wildlife challenges of Bergen County properties. We offer same-day emergency service, humane removal techniques, and complete exclusion work to ensure raccoons don't return to your attic, chimney, or crawl space.
localContext: Englewood's mix of vintage colonial homes, the tree-lined streets near Dwight Morrow High School, and properties backing onto wooded areas create ideal conditions for raccoon activity. The proximity to both Flat Rock Brook Nature Center and Allison Park means raccoons frequently venture into residential neighborhoods seeking food and shelter, particularly in attics and garages of older homes.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in Englewood, NJ?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in Englewood typically ranges from $900 to $4,000 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of raccoons, location of the nest, and necessary repairs. A single raccoon in an easily accessible area costs less than a family of raccoons in your attic requiring extensive exclusion work. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Are raccoons common in Englewood, New Jersey?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons are very common in Englewood due to the area's mature trees, proximity to wooded areas like Flat Rock Brook, and abundance of food sources in residential neighborhoods. Raccoons are attracted to garbage, pet food, and the attics and chimneys of Englewood's many older homes, which provide ideal denning sites especially during breeding season from late winter through spring.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove raccoons from my Englewood property?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service for emergency raccoon situations in Englewood. The complete removal process typically takes 3-7 days depending on whether we're dealing with a single raccoon or a mother with babies. We use humane trapping methods and one-way exclusion doors, and we'll monitor the situation until we confirm all raccoons have been removed and entry points are sealed.

faqs.question: Do you repair damage caused by raccoons in Englewood homes?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide complete raccoon damage restoration services including attic insulation replacement, soffit and fascia repair, chimney cap installation, and sanitization of contaminated areas. Raccoons can cause significant structural damage and leave behind hazardous waste, so we offer comprehensive cleanup and repair to return your Englewood home to its original condition and prevent future wildlife entry.
